decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast-paced aggressive strategy utilizing creatures like Badgermole Cub, Pawpatch Recruit, and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker. Supporting cards like Practiced Offense and Brightglass Gearhulk help maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes removal options like Seam Rip and Ouroboroid to deal with threats. Additionally, ramp cards such as Llanowar Elves and Multiversal Passage help ensure a smooth mana curve for playing powerful spells like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Jennifer Walters. The deck aims to quickly establish a board presence and close out the game efficiently.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with fast and efficient creatures to deal damage quickly. It utilizes a combination of low-cost creatures like Llanowar Elves and Pawpatch Recruit, along with powerful finishers like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Brightglass Gearhulk. The inclusion of cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Starting Town help with protecting creatures and maintaining board presence. By combining aggression with resilience, this deck aims to control the board early on and close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on controlling the board through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and bounce effects. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early defense, while cards like Sunderflock and Traumatic Critique help deal with threats on the board. Prismari Charm and other instant-speed spells allow for flexibility in responding to the opponent's plays. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by leveraging card advantage and efficient removal, ultimately controlling the pace of the game until it can secure a win condition.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and utilize various combat tricks and abilities to maintain board control. The deck focuses on a Selesnya aggro strategy, combining efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Pawpatch Recruit with powerful support cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. By leveraging the synergy between cards like Practiced Offense and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker, this deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain tempo throughout the game to secure victory.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of removal spells, discard effects, and card advantage. By using cards like Stock Up and Tablet of Discovery to draw cards and generate resources, and spells like Inevitable Defeat and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent. The mana base is carefully crafted to support a variety of colors to cast the diverse spells in the deck. Additionally, the inclusion of powerful finishers like Jeskai Revelation ensures that the deck can close out games once it has gained control.

The main focus of this deck is to control the opponent's actions and resources through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. By using cards like Jeskai Revelation and Accumulate Wisdom, the player can draw into more answers while keeping the opponent's threats at bay. The inclusion of Firebending Lesson and Gran-Gran helps to generate additional value and card advantage. The overall strategy is to outlast the opponent and eventually overwhelm them with powerful spells like Price of Freedom and Combustion Technique.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly and efficiently control the board while dealing damage to the opponent. By utilizing cards like Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off to disrupt the opponent's strategy, as well as creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to apply pressure and deal direct damage, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and finish the game quickly. Opt and Sleight of Hand help to ensure consistency and find key cards, while Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent provide additional burn damage to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing a combination of reanimation spells and powerful creatures to overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Bitter Triumph and Restless Reef to build up resources, and then bringing back powerful creatures like M.O.D.O.K. and Doomsday Excruciator from the graveyard with cards like Superior Spider-Man and Requiting Hex, the deck aims to establish board presence and control the game. With additional control elements like Duress and Deadly Cover-Up, the deck is designed to disrupt the opponent's strategy while executing its own powerful combos.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a strong board presence with efficient creatures and utilizing ramp to quickly get ahead in mana. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression while maintaining card advantage through card draw and land ramp. The deck also includes some removal and protection spells to ensure that the opponent can't easily stabilize. Overall, this deck aims to win the game through constant pressure and efficient mana usage.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence with aggressive creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Eddymurk Crab, backed up by efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Flow State to control the board and deal direct damage. The deck also includes card draw and mana fixing to ensure smooth gameplay. The key strategy is to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan with spells like Spell Pierce and Boomerang Basics. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with high-tempo plays and efficient resource management.

This deck focuses on utilizing cheap, efficient spells and creatures to apply constant pressure on the opponent. It aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently, using card draw and mana acceleration to maintain aggression. The creatures in the deck have varying abilities to either deal damage directly or enhance the damage output of other creatures. The land base is optimized for casting spells quickly and efficiently. The overall strategy of the deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board through card advantage and removal spells, using a combination of counterspells, burn spells, and draw spells to maintain control and outvalue opponents. The deck aims to outlast opponents with resource management and efficient plays, utilizing powerful finishers like Thor, God of Thunder and Combustion Technique to close out games. By carefully managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, this control deck seeks to dictate the pace of the game and ultimately secure victory through its powerful card advantage engines and versatile removal suite.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful spells. By utilizing cards like Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Brightglass Gearhulk, along with ramp from Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on. Additionally, cards like Practiced Offense and Seam Rip provide additional damage and disruption to keep the pressure on the opponent. The inclusion of Multiversal Passage and Ba Sing Se allows for flexibility in mana fixing and protection against removal.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence with efficient creature drops like Llanowar Elves and Badgermole Cub, supported by powerful cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker. The deck also includes combat tricks like Meltstrider's Resolve and Seam Rip to push through damage and finish off opponents. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless stream of creatures and removal spells, utilizing the synergy between the cards to close out games swiftly.

The key concept of this Naya Aggro deck is to overwhelm your opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle. By using a combination of low-cost creatures and instant spells, you aim to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The deck focuses on maximizing damage output while maintaining board presence with cards like Practiced Offense and Keen-Eyed Curator. Utilizing cards like Overprotect and Snakeskin Veil can help protect your creatures from removal spells, allowing you to maintain pressure on your opponent. Overall, the deck aims to win the game through fast and relentless aggression.

This deck focuses on applying early pressure by playing aggressive creatures and using efficient removal spells. It aims to quickly build a board presence and deal damage to the opponent before they can stabilize. Key cards such as Iron-Shield Elf, Marauding Mako, and Carnage, Crimson Chaos help establish a threatening board while Practiced Offense and Sunset Saboteur provide additional reach and card advantage. The deck also utilizes a combination of lands that allow for a consistent mana base to support its aggressive strategy.
